data.name: SignInCodeBody
data.value: Your sign-in code is {0}. It expires in 10 minutes and can be used once. If you did not request it, you can safely ignore this email.

data.name: InvitationBody
data.value: You have been invited to {0}. Open this link to set up your account: {1} The link can be used once and expires in {2} days.

data.name: PasswordResetBody
data.value: Open this link to reset your password: {0} The link can be used once and expires in 1 hour. If you did not request it, you can safely ignore this email.
